privileged_info_summary: Task requires creating a synthetic marketing campaign in iDempiere's GardenWorld ERP client. The campaign has search key SPRING-GARDEN-2025, name 'Spring Garden Promotion 2025', and description containing keywords 'garden' and 'promotion' describing seasonal promotion on garden supplies and outdoor furniture targeting residential customers. Campaign duration is April 1, 2025 to June 30, 2025 with planned budget costs of 15000. All data values are synthetic test parameters specified for GUI automation testing within iDempiere ERP system.
